desc: ชื่นมื่น! นายกฯ หารือประธานาธิบดีปูติน เน้นย้ำมิตรภาพ ไทย-รัสเซีย ยาวนานกว่า 130 ปี มุ่งขยายความร่วมมือเศรษฐกิจ พลังงาน และการเชื่อมโยงประชาชน
title_cn: 总理阿努廷与普京总统磋商泰俄经济能源合作
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anusit）与俄罗斯总统普京（Putin）举行高层磋商，强调泰俄友好关系已超130年历史，双方致力于扩大经济、能源领域合作，加强人民往来和文化交流。
desc_original: ชื่นมื่น! นายกฯ หารือประธานาธิบดีปูติน เน้นย้ำมิตรภาพ ไทย-รัสเซีย ยาวนานกว่า 130 ปี มุ่งขยายความร่วมมือเศรษฐกิจ พลังงาน และการเชื่อมโยงประชาชน

title: “เอกนิติ” เผยเศรษฐกิจไทยรับสัญญาณบวก จ่อถก กรอ. นัดแรก 22 มิ.ย. นี้
desc: “เอกนิติ” เตรียมงัดกลไก กรอ. ประชุมนัดแรก 22 มิ.ย. นี้ หลังเศรษฐกิจไทยรับสัญญาณบวก 2 เด้ง ลุยรื้อโครงสร้าง 4 ด้าน เปิดตัว Thailand Fast Pass ปรับการทำงานร่วมมือรัฐ-เอกชน เหมือนยุค พล.อ.เปรม
title_cn: 政府启动四大结构改革，推出「泰国快速通道」计划
summary_cn: 政府经济顾问叻尼（Ekkanet）透露泰国经济出现两大利好信号，6月22日召开改革委员会首次会议，启动结构改革四大方向，推出「泰国快速通道」（Thailand Fast Pass）计划，改善公私合作机制，标志政策推进步入新阶段。
desc_original: “เอกนิติ” เตรียมงัดกลไก กรอ. ประชุมนัดแรก 22 มิ.ย. นี้ หลังเศรษฐกิจไทยรับสัญญาณบวก 2 เด้ง ลุยรื้อโครงสร้าง 4 ด้าน เปิดตัว Thailand Fast Pass ปรับการทำงานร่วมมือรัฐ-เอกชน เหมือนยุค พล.อ.เปรม

summary_cn: 分析人士看好美国与伊朗谅解备忘录将改善全球投资气氛。泰国财政部表示将重新评估经济前景，同时政府加快制定2570年预算。披露数据显示，2569年预算结余仅为103亿泰铢收回国库。

desc: วธอ. ผนึกเศรษฐศาสตร์ธรรมศาสตร์ สร้างผู้นำธุรกิจแห่งอนาคต ผ่านหลักสูตรผู้บริหารระดับสูง วธอ.11 เปิดมุมมองเศรษฐกิจโลก เพื่อขับเคลื่อนธุรกิจไทยสู่การเติบโตอย่างยั่งยืน อบรมฟรี ไม่มีค่าใช้จ่าย
title_cn: 泰国工业联合会携手法政大学经济系推出第11期高管培训课程
summary_cn: 泰国工业联合会与法政大学经济系合作，通过高阶主管培训课程第11期培养新一代商业领袖，拓展全球经济视野，推动泰国企业实现可持续发展。培训项目完全免费。
desc_original: วธอ. ผนึกเศรษฐศาสตร์ธรรมศาสตร์ สร้างผู้นำธุรกิจแห่งอนาคต ผ่านหลักสูตรผู้บริหารระดับสูง วธอ.11 เปิดมุมมองเศรษฐกิจโลก เพื่อขับเคลื่อนธุรกิจไทยสู่การเติบโตอย่างยั่งยืน อบรมฟรี ไม่มีค่าใช้จ่าย

title: Thap Lan land disputes linger
desc: Siho Uthakayotha, 63, was expected to be celebrating. After decades of uncertainty over land occupied by his community near Thap Lan National Park in Nakhon Ratchasima, a decision to remove 155,865 rai of overlapping land from the park boundary was viewed as a long-awaited breakthrough.
title_cn: 达兰国家公园土地纠纷悬而未决
summary_cn: 那空叻差马府一社区在达兰国家公园（Thap Lan National Park）附近的土地所有权经历数十年不确定状态。政府决定将15.5万莱重叠地块从公园边界移除，被视为多年纠纷的重大进展。
desc_original: Siho Uthakayotha, 63, was expected to be celebrating. After decades of uncertainty over land occupied by his community near Thap Lan National Park in Nakhon Ratchasima, a decision to remove 155,865 rai of overlapping land from the park boundary was viewed as a long-awaited breakthrough.

title: วันสุดท้ายแล้ว ผู้ถือบัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐ อย่าลืมลงทะเบียนรับส่วนลด "ค่าไฟ-ค่าน้ำ"
desc: ย้ำผู้ถือบัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐรายเดิม ที่ยังไม่เคยลงทะเบียนรับส่วนลด "ค่าไฟฟ้า-ค่าน้ำประปา" สามารถยื่นรับสิทธิได้วันสุดท้าย 19 มิถุนายน 2569
title_cn: 最后一天！国家福利卡持有人务必登记领取电费和水费折扣
summary_cn: 提醒国家福利卡持有人，未曾登记领取电费和水费折扣的用户，可在2569年6月19日最后期限前提交申请。符合条件的持卡人可获得相关公用事业费用的优惠。
desc_original: ย้ำผู้ถือบัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐรายเดิม ที่ยังไม่เคยลงทะเบียนรับส่วนลด "ค่าไฟฟ้า-ค่าน้ำประปา" สามารถยื่นรับสิทธิได้วันสุดท้าย 19 มิถุนายน 2569

title: Forex probe names due out Friday
desc: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) will on Friday reveal the names of individuals allegedly linked to a suspected illegal foreign-exchange investment and trading network, amid reports that politicians and entertainment figures could be implicated in the case.
title_cn: 外汇诈骗案嫌疑人名单周五公布
summary_cn: 特别调查局（DSI）将于周五公开涉嫌参与非法外汇投资交易网络的嫌疑人身份。据报道，政界人士和娱乐圈人物可能牵涉其中，引发广泛关注。
desc_original: The Department of Special Investigation (DSI) will on Friday reveal the names of individuals allegedly linked to a suspected illegal foreign-exchange investment and trading network, amid reports that politicians and entertainment figures could be implicated in the case.

title: Ekniti warns of energy risks despite US-Iran deal
desc: Thailand has welcomed the ceasefire framework between the United States and Iran but warned that global energy markets could remain under pressure despite an easing of tensions in the Middle East.
title_cn: 埃克尼蒂警告：美伊协议下能源风险依然存在
summary_cn: 泰国政府欢迎美国与伊朗之间达成的停火框架协议，但对全球能源市场的稳定性保持谨慎态度。虽然中东地区局势紧张局面有所缓解，但全球能源市场仍可能面临长期压力。作为能源进口国，泰国对国际能源价格的波动风险高度敏感，此举反映了政府对能源供应链稳定性的深度关切。
desc_original: Thailand has welcomed the ceasefire framework between the United States and Iran but warned that global energy markets could remain under pressure despite an easing of tensions in the Middle East.

title: Parliament passes new  trade deals
desc: Parliament has approved five major international trade agreements, paving the way for Thailand to expand market access in Europe and South Asia.
title_cn: 泰国议会通过五项新贸易协议
summary_cn: 泰国议会批准了五项重大国际贸易协议，这一重要决议将为泰国扩大市场准入创造有利条件。协议涵盖欧洲和南亚地区，有助于泰国产品打开新的贸易市场，促进国家经济增长。这些贸易协议的批准标志着泰国对外经贸战略的新阶段。
desc_original: Parliament has approved five major international trade agreements, paving the way for Thailand to expand market access in Europe and South Asia.

title: Officials offer advice to prevent panic buying of fuel
desc: Policymakers should prioritise managing public sentiment during potential energy crises, warning that panic buying can be more disruptive than actual fuel shortages, says an energy analyst.
title_cn: 官员建议防止燃油抢购
summary_cn: 能源分析师强调，在能源供应可能出现危机时，管理公众心理和舆论至关重要。历史经验表明，由恐慌引发的燃油抢购现象所造成的社会混乱，往往比实际燃油短缺对经济和日常生活的影响更为严重。政策制定者应重点关注信息透明和舆情管理。
desc_original: Policymakers should prioritise managing public sentiment during potential energy crises, warning that panic buying can be more disruptive than actual fuel shortages, says an energy analyst.

title: Clicx debuts with special interest rates of up to 4%
desc: On its first day of operation today, Thailand's first virtual bank Clicx debuted by offering deposit rates of up to 4% per year to attract customers.
title_cn: 泰国首家虚拟银行Clicx推出最高4%存款利率
summary_cn: 泰国首家虚拟银行Clicx于今日正式开业，推出了年存款利率最高达4%的优惠政策以吸引用户。作为泰国数字金融创新的重要里程碑，Clicx的推出将为泰国消费者提供更多元的金融服务选择，推动泰国银行业数字化转型。
desc_original: On its first day of operation today, Thailand's first virtual bank Clicx debuted by offering deposit rates of up to 4% per year to attract customers.

title: Thailand eyes Russia trade
desc: Thailand and Russia are seeking to strengthen trade and investment cooperation in sectors ranging from energy and fertilisers to digital technology and innovation.
title_cn: 泰国加强与俄罗斯贸易合作
summary_cn: 泰国与俄罗斯正深化贸易和投资合作，合作范围涵盖能源、化肥、数字技术和创新等多个战略性产业领域。两国合作既包括传统商品贸易，也涉及新兴技术合作，体现了互利共赢的原则。这一举措表明泰国正在积极拓展多元化国际伙伴关系，优化经贸布局。
desc_original: Thailand and Russia are seeking to strengthen trade and investment cooperation in sectors ranging from energy and fertilisers to digital technology and innovation.

title: KTAM targets portfolio reaching B1.1tn by end of 2026
desc: Krungthai Asset Management (KTAM) aims to increase its assets under management (AUM) to 1.1 trillion baht by the end of 2026, supported by product innovation, digital investment solutions, and closer collaboration with parent bank Krungthai Bank (KTB).
title_cn: Krungthai资管目标2026年底资产规模达1.1万亿泰铢
summary_cn: 泰国Krungthai资管公司（KTAM）计划于2026年底前将资产管理规模提升至1.1万亿泰铢，通过产品创新、数字投资解决方案与母公司Krungthai Bank（KTB）的深化合作来实现这一目标。
desc_original: Krungthai Asset Management (KTAM) aims to increase its assets under management (AUM) to 1.1 trillion baht by the end of 2026, supported by product innovation, digital investment solutions, and closer collaboration with parent bank Krungthai Bank (KTB).

title: Committee questions navy gun disposal
desc: A parliamentary committee has ordered the excavation of destroyed naval firearms amid doubts over their disposal and a link to the March 20 shooting attack on Narathiwat MP Kamolsak Leewamoh.
title_cn: 国会委员会质询海军火炮处置程序
summary_cn: 泰国国会委员会下令挖掘被销毁的海军火炮，因其处置程序存在疑问，且可能与3月20日针对那拉提瓦府（Narathiwat）议员Kamolsak Leewamoh的枪击事件有关。
desc_original: A parliamentary committee has ordered the excavation of destroyed naval firearms amid doubts over their disposal and a link to the March 20 shooting attack on Narathiwat MP Kamolsak Leewamoh.

title: Brunei ties deepen in Kazan
desc: Thailand and Brunei have agreed to advance cooperation in food security, energy, health and investment during talks at the Asean–Russia Commemorative Summit in Kazan.
title_cn: 泰国与文莱在喀山深化关系
summary_cn: 在俄罗斯城市喀山（Kazan）举行的东盟-俄罗斯纪念峰会期间，泰国与文莱就双边合作进行了深入会谈，两国同意在粮食安全、能源、卫生和投资等多个战略领域进一步深化合作。
desc_original: Thailand and Brunei have agreed to advance cooperation in food security, energy, health and investment during talks at the Asean–Russia Commemorative Summit in Kazan.

title: Anucha targets BMA procurements
desc: Democrat candidate Anucha Burapachaisri has alleged irregularities in Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) procurement projects worth more than 50 billion baht, prompting a rebuttal from former governor Chadchart Sittipunt, who insists all procurement procedures under his administration complied with regulations.
title_cn: 民主党候选人Anucha质疑曼谷市政采购程序
summary_cn: 民主党候选人Anucha Burapachaisri声称发现曼谷都市管理局（BMA）在超过500亿泰铢的采购项目中存在违规操作，前市长Chadchart Sittipunt对此予以强硬驳斥，坚称其任期内所有采购程序都严格遵守规定。
desc_original: Democrat candidate Anucha Burapachaisri has alleged irregularities in Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) procurement projects worth more than 50 billion baht, prompting a rebuttal from former governor Chadchart Sittipunt, who insists all procurement procedures under his administration complied with regulations.

title: BJT officials face work review
desc: The ruling Bhumjaithai Party (BJT) will assess the performance of its ministers, parliamentary committee chairpersons, and political officeholders after one year in office, with underperformers potentially replaced, according to party leaders.
title_cn: 功德党官员面临绩效评估
summary_cn: 执政的功德党（BJT）将对其内阁部长、国会委员会主席及其他政治任职人员在过去一年的工作绩效进行全面评估，表现未达预期的官员将面临被替换的可能。
desc_original: The ruling Bhumjaithai Party (BJT) will assess the performance of its ministers, parliamentary committee chairpersons, and political officeholders after one year in office, with underperformers potentially replaced, according to party leaders.

title: PP urges probe into steel plant's licence
desc: The opposition People's Party (PP) is urging Industry Minister Varawut Silpa-archa to investigate Xin Ke Yuan Steel Co Ltd (SKY)'s operating licence, citing a lack of transparency, questionable inspections and concerns over the release of more than 40,000 previously confiscated steel bars into the market.
title_cn: 人民党要求调查Xin Ke Yuan Steel Co Ltd（SKY）钢铁厂牌照
summary_cn: 泰国反对党人民党（PP）促请工业部长瓦拉瓦特（Varawut Silpa-archa）调查新可源钢铁公司（SKY）的营业执照，指出该公司存在透明度不足、检查程序有疑问，以及将超过4万根没收的钢材重新投放市场等问题。
desc_original: The opposition People's Party (PP) is urging Industry Minister Varawut Silpa-archa to investigate Xin Ke Yuan Steel Co Ltd (SKY)'s operating licence, citing a lack of transparency, questionable inspections and concerns over the release of more than 40,000 previously confiscated steel bars into the market.

title: Branded residences take off in Thailand
desc: While Vietnam has surpassed Thailand as Asia's most valuable branded residence market, Thailand still leads its peer with the largest launch of luxury development, according to hospitality consultancy C9 Hotelworks.
title_cn: 泰国品牌公寓市场蓬勃发展
summary_cn: 据酒店咨询机构C9 Hotelworks数据，越南已超越泰国成为亚洲最具价值的品牌公寓市场，但泰国仍保持该市场最大规模豪华开发项目的领先地位。这反映泰国高端住宅市场的持续强劲表现。
desc_original: While Vietnam has surpassed Thailand as Asia's most valuable branded residence market, Thailand still leads its peer with the largest launch of luxury development, according to hospitality consultancy C9 Hotelworks.

title: State co-pay scheme fuels food delivery growth
desc: Quick meals, noodles, and coffee or tea are among the top orders via food delivery platforms under the "Thai Chuay Thai Plus" state co-payment scheme.
title_cn: 泰国政府补贴方案推动外卖市场增长
summary_cn: 在泰国政府「泰助泰加」（Thai Chuay Thai Plus）共付补贴计划下，外卖平台上快餐、面食、咖啡和茶饮订单位居前列。该计划有效刺激了本地餐饮外卖业发展，展示了政府对消费经济的支持力度。
desc_original: Quick meals, noodles, and coffee or tea are among the top orders via food delivery platforms under the "Thai Chuay Thai Plus" state co-payment scheme.

title: Instagram seen as new force for digital commerce in Thailand
desc: Meta has positioned Instagram as a driver of Thai digital economic growth, highlighting the platform's growing influence in commerce, creator monetisation and cultural engagement as businesses increasingly seek new avenues for expansion.
title_cn: Instagram成为泰国数字商业新动力
summary_cn: Meta公司将Instagram定位为泰国数字经济增长的引擎，强调该平台在商业、创作者变现和文化互动方面的日益增强影响力。随着越来越多泰国企业寻求新扩张渠道，Instagram在该国数字商业生态中的地位愈发重要。
desc_original: Meta has positioned Instagram as a driver of Thai digital economic growth, highlighting the platform's growing influence in commerce, creator monetisation and cultural engagement as businesses increasingly seek new avenues for expansion.

title: Could Hua Hin be Thailand’s next best place to live?
desc: Could Hua Hin be Thailand’s next best place to live? Legacy Hua Hin has always had a certain kind of reputation. Royal family. Old money. Bangkok elite with weekend houses and golf memberships. Retirees who found the pace of life agreeable never went back. It was never the loudest city in Thailand, and that was rather the point. That reputation is only the beginning. Something has been shifting in Hua Hin over the past few years, and the people arriving now look quite different from the ones who came before. A town in transition The demographic picture in Hua Hin has changed noticeably since COVID-19. Remote work untethered a generation of professionals from city offices, and many of them asked a reasonable question: if I can work from anywhere, why am I paying Bangkok rent ? Hua Hin offered an answer. Clean air, low crime , a functioning town with charming seaside restaurants and hospitals, beaches within reach, and a pace of life that does not grind people down. Younger expats, digital nomads, and professionals moving in from Bangkok, Phuket , Chiang Mai, Koh Samui , and Pattaya , along with families, began arriving in numbers that the town had not seen before. summary_cn: 警方在泰国高速公路上截停一辆贴有政府标志的公务车，驾驶员以121公里/小时的时速行驶，远超限制。驾驶员声称需要赶时间参加会议，并请求交警提供便利。该事件反映了部分公务人员对交通法规的漠视。

summary_cn: 泰国主要加油站PTT和Bangchak宣布油价下调，自6月19日凌晨5时起生效。汽油和汽油醇每升降价1.50泰铢，柴油每升降价1.30泰铢，高级油品除外。此举有助缓解消费者燃油成本压力，直接影响民众生活开支。

title: Top civil servant defends TH-AI Passport project
desc: The Ministry of Digital Economy and Society has strongly defended the controversial TH-AI Passport project, rejecting allegations of procurement irregularities, bid-rigging and political favouritism.
title_cn: 政府高级官员为「TH-AI护照」项目辩护
summary_cn: 泰国数字经济和社会部强烈为备受争议的「TH-AI护照」项目进行辩护，否认了关于采购程序违规、招标串通和政治偏袒的指控。该项目涉及AI技术应用于护照管理，在政界和公众间引发持续讨论。
desc_original: The Ministry of Digital Economy and Society has strongly defended the controversial TH-AI Passport project, rejecting allegations of procurement irregularities, bid-rigging and political favouritism.

title: Eight arrested over illegal ID‑card scheme linked to scams
desc: CHIANG RAI — Eight people were arrested Thursday in Chiang Rai on suspicion of running a scheme that illegally issued Thai identity cards to foreigners, including Chinese and Myanmar nationals, allegedly enabling scammers, drug traffickers and money‑launderers, police said.
title_cn: 清莱破获非法身份证诈骗案 8人被捕
summary_cn: 泰国清莱警方日前逮捕8名嫌疑人，他们涉嫌运营一个非法身份证发放组织，向包括中国和缅甸籍在内的外国人颁发泰国身份证。据警方称，这些伪造证件被诈骗分子、毒品贩运集团及洗钱人士利用，形成了一条完整的犯罪链条。该案涉及多国人员和严重的跨境犯罪，对在泰人员安全构成直接威胁。
desc_original: CHIANG RAI — Eight people were arrested Thursday in Chiang Rai on suspicion of running a scheme that illegally issued Thai identity cards to foreigners, including Chinese and Myanmar nationals, allegedly enabling scammers, drug traffickers and money‑launderers, police said.

title_cn: 泰国住房银行CEO提新愿景 助普通家庭保留住房度危机
summary_cn: 泰国住房银行(Government Housing Bank)首席执行官Mahatthana提出新愿景，将帮助泰国民众特别是低收入和中等收入家庭保留住房，共同应对当前的能源危机和经济困难。该银行计划成为普通民众的「住房顾问」，通过优化贷款政策和提供定制化服务，为受危机影响的群众提供金融支持，防止家庭财产流失。

title_cn: 4大蓝筹股跌出SET50 券商提示基本面稳健存布局机会
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易所(SET)进行年中指数成分调整，BTS、CBG、CENTEL、SAWAD等4只权重股因排名变化即将被剔除SET50主要指数。尽管面临市场抛售压力，多家证券公司分析认为这些公司基本面和盈利能力仍保持稳健，可能成为价值投资者分批建仓的优质时机。

title: Thai railway tourism to offer OTOP products and local food to passengers
desc: Thai railway tourism to offer OTOP products and local food to passengers Legacy Thailand is preparing to improve railway tourism by adopting elements of Japan’s community-based tourism model, including the sale of local food and OTOP products on tourism train services. The initiative was discussed during the 3rd Thailand-Japan Railway Workshop on June 17, when the Department of Rail Transport (DRT) welcomed Okuda Tetsuya, President of the Japan Transport and Tourism Research Institute ASEAN-India Regional Office (JTTRI-AIRO). Held under the theme Railways and Tourism, the workshop focused on strengthening Thailand’s railway tourism sector through knowledge sharing and cooperation with Japan. DRT Director-General Pichet Kunathamrak said the department had proposed several areas for collaboration and plans to adapt successful Japanese railway tourism practices to suit Thailand’s rail network and tourism industry. Photo via Department of Rail Transport Beyond enhancing travel experiences, Pichet said railway tourism is aimed to support local economies by promoting regional culture and creating additional income opportunities for communities located along railway rout
title_cn: 泰国铁路旅游升级 借鉴日本模式推行本地特产销售
summary_cn: 泰国铁路部门正在推行以日本社区旅游为借鉴的计划，在铁路旅游列车上销售泰国本地特产(OTOP产品)和地方美食特色。该项目在泰日铁路研讨会上获批，旨在通过铁路旅游支撑地方经济，推广沿线社区的区域文化和特色产业，为当地居民创造额外收入和就业机会，提升游客体验。

title: Police say suspects extorting Thai-Hong Kong woman are not officers
desc: Police say suspects extorting Thai-Hong Kong woman are not officers Legacy Bangkok police denied allegations that officers extorted money from a Thai-Hong Kong woman who filed a complaint after losing tens of millions of baht in a fortune-telling scam . The woman, 47 year old Phetcharin, sought assistance from the Saimai Survive foundation after she lost money to a female fortune teller and later paid additional funds to people she believed were involved in handling her case. According to Phetcharin, she first contacted the fortune teller after discovering that her husband had been unfaithful. She said the woman advised her to participate in various rituals and purchase amulets, leading to payments over a period of more than four years. Phetcharin later suspected that she had been deceived, so she travelled to Thailand to file a police complaint. Thai news outlets reported the amount of the loss differently, stating figures between 30 and 40 million baht. title_cn: 警方否认涉敲诈 泰港女性遭卦师及冒充警察多重诈骗
summary_cn: 一名47岁泰籍港人女性长期遭卦师诈骗数千万泰铢后，又被冒充警察的诈骗分子索要数十万泰铢进行所谓「调查」。该女性返泰报案后继续遭敲诈。曼谷警方否认警察参与此事，表示嫌疑人并非真正执法人员。此案反映诈骗分子利用权力假象进行二次诈骗的常见套路，对旅泰外国人形成双重威胁。

title: 泰国普吉“豪宅项目”出事！16名中国人涉签证违规，62名缅甸人非法入境
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国南部第四军区下属打击复合威胁专项行动组联合多个执法部门，于18日上午对普吉府一处大型建筑项目展开突击检查，查获16名涉嫌持错误签证从事管理工作的中国公民，以及62名非法入境或无法出示合法入境证明的缅甸籍劳工。执法部门正进一步调查该项目是否涉及外国人通过“泰国人挂名持股”方式经营业务的问题。 据悉，当天上午10时许，负责泰国南部14府安全事务的专项执法部门接获普吉民众举报，称当地一处建筑工地存在异常情况，多名中国公民担任工程师及项目管理人员，而现场大部分劳工为缅甸籍人员。执法人员随即联合第41宪兵营、第15步兵团第1营等相关单位，对位于普吉府的住宅项目Ayana Heights Seaview Residence Phuket展开检查。 初步调查发现多项涉嫌违法行为。执法人员当场逮捕16名中国籍项目管理人员，指其涉嫌使用与实际工作性质不符的签证在泰工作；同时查获62名缅甸籍劳工无法出示合法入境泰国的相关证件。 目前，所有涉案人员已被移送至普吉府呈塔莱警察局依法处理。警方将整理案卷并提交普吉府法院审理。案件结束后，相关外籍劳工将移交普吉移民局，依法遣返出境。 此外，执法部门表示，正进一步核查该项目的股权结构、经营模式及相关资金流向，以确认是否存在外国人借用泰国人名义持股、规避法律限制经营业务的“挂名公司”行为，并将依法严肃处理。 （编译：WAN；图源： Nonthawat Wisutthipat ） The post 泰国普吉“豪宅项目”出事！16名中国人涉签证违规，62名缅甸人非法入境 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 泰国全球竞争力排名升至第26位，越南首次入榜紧追其后
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月18日，瑞士国际管理发展学院（IMD）旗下世界竞争力中心日前发布2026年度国家竞争力排名报告。报告显示，泰国较上年上升4个名次，在全部70个经济体中位列全球第26位。越南首次参与排名，位列全球第27位，仅落后泰国1个名次。 泰国商业管理协会（TMA）下属竞争力发展中心对该排名结果进行分析指出，泰国排名提升主要得益于企业效率与基础设施两大因素的改善，分别上升3个和2个名次；政府效率维持不变，而经济表现则下滑2个名次。 在东盟国家中，泰国排名第3，仅次于新加坡（全球第1）和马来西亚（全球第15）。越南在政府效率和企业效率方面的排名均优于泰国，其中企业效率排名较泰国高出6个名次。菲律宾和印度尼西亚分别位列第47位和第48位。 IMD排名基于经济表现、政府效率、企业效率和基础设施四大因素，涵盖172项统计数据指标及92项企业高管意见调查指标，共计264项指标。今年IMD首次将越南纳入排名，受评经济体数量增至70个。 分析显示，泰国在经济表现方面从第8位下滑至第10位，主要受国际贸易排名下降5个名次影响。政府效率仍为弱项，排名维持在第32位，其中法治、腐败问题及政府透明度分别位列第57位、第52位和第51位，商业法律与法规排名第40位。 企业效率方面，泰国从第24位上升至第21位，劳动力市场上升7个名次至第10位，金融部门上升6个名次至第31位。但分析指出，泰国在整体生产率、劳动生产率及各经济部门生产率方面水平仍然偏低，亟待改善。 基础设施方面，泰国从第47位上升至第45位，基础公用设施大幅改善5个名次至第20位。但技术基础设施下滑7个名次至第39位，原因在于IMD今年新增了人工智能（AI）相关评估指标，涉及9项新指标。 泰国商业管理协会表示，尽管排名有所上升，但在地缘政治不确定性、全球贸易体系波动、气候变化及AI技术快速发展等挑战下，泰国仍需加快改进法律法规、提升执法透明度，为企业界和投资者建立信心。协会强调，竞争力较强的经济体普遍具备清晰的制度管理框架与法规体系，这正是泰国须加快发展以提升长期竞争潜力的关键所在。 （编译：WAN；来源：thansettakij） The post 泰国全球竞争力排名升至第26位，越南首次入榜紧追其后 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Phuket Marriott Resort & Spa Merlin Beach drone shields towns, turtles
desc: Phuket Marriott Resort & Spa Merlin Beach drone shields towns, turtles Legacy Phuket Marriott Resort & Spa Merlin Beach, in partnership with the Maikhao Marine Turtle Foundation and Andamanda Phuket Waterpark, announced the positive impact of their joint donation of a DJI Mavic 4 Thermal drone. Guided by Marriott’s Serve 360 commitment to doing good in every direction, this equipment has played a vital role in crucial social and environmental missions nationwide. In recent efforts, the drone has been actively deployed for flood relief operations in Songkhla province and marine conservation efforts in Phang Nga province. It has provided essential support for emergency responses, aerial surveys, public communication, and wildlife monitoring. Elevating crisis relief efforts During a three-day flood relief operation, the donated equipment provided direct support to local communities. The drone assisted by providing battery charging services to 650 people, powering 526 mobile phones and seven flashlights in times of crisis. summary_cn: 普吉万豪度假村美林海滩与Maikhao海龟保护基金会及Andamanda水上乐园合作，捐赠DJI Mavic 4热成像无人机用于社会和环保任务。该设备在松他府洪灾救援中为650名灾民提供手机充电服务，协助紧急转运患者。同时在攀牙府从事海洋生物保护和监测工作，支持应急响应和野生动物监护。

title: Suspect livestreams his arrest after killing, stealing Yaba from lottery vendor
desc: Suspect livestreams his arrest after killing, stealing Yaba from lottery vendor Legacy Police arrested three suspects for fatally shooting a lottery vendor in Buriram and stealing methamphetamine , locally known as Yaba, from the deceased. One of the suspects livestreamed their arrest on social media. Officers from Prakhon Chai Police Station launched an investigation after the vendor, Pichit Chaiyaphum, was found dead at around 12.20am on June 16. Pichit was discovered on a road while still on his motorcycle. Pichit had sustained four gunshot wounds to the chest. Investigators also found a package containing 150 methamphetamine tablets near his body. Security camera footage reviewed by police showed a white sedan travelling closely behind Pichit’s motorcycle. A man in the sedan fired a shot into the air, prompting Pichit to stop his motorcycle and approach the vehicle. title: LingOrm合体献唱新剧主题曲
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰国媒体报道 近日，泰国人气CP档LingLing Kwong与Orm Kornnaphat为即将播出的GL剧《绘梦婚礼》献唱主题曲《ทั้งเจ็บทั้งรัก》（Hurt and Love），歌曲及MV已于6月17日正式上线。 《ทั้งเจ็บทั้งรัก》由知名制作团队NP TEAM操刀制作，通过歌曲传递剧中角色复杂而深刻的情感变化。歌词讲述一段曾经美好的感情逐渐发生改变，但因仍深爱对方而选择继续坚守，期待有朝一日能够重回从前的故事。 歌曲同时也是剧中两位主角的内心写照。作为一对新婚伴侣，两人在婚后生活中遭遇感情考验，不得不共同面对来自家庭与现实的重重压力。 电视剧《绘梦婚礼》讲述了一对因爱结合的妻妻伴侣，在婚后生活中面对女方母亲的反对与阻挠。对方千方百计试图拆散两人，使这段感情陷入考验，也让两位主角在“爱与痛”之间不断挣扎。 值得一提的是，该剧是LingLing与Orm继此前作品后的第三次合作，也是两人首次与知名导演Jaew Yuthana携手合作。剧集改编自作家reallyb的同名人气小说。 据悉，《绘梦婚礼》将于泰国时间每周五晚8时30分在三台播出，并同步上线3Plus Premium及Netflix平台。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：thestandard） The post LingOrm合体献唱新剧主题曲 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰星CP LingLing和Orm合作献唱新剧主题曲
summary_cn: 泰国明星CP LingLing Kwong和Orm Kornnaphat合体为GL剧《绘梦婚礼》献唱主题曲《ทั้งเจ็บทั้งรัก》。歌曲由NP TEAM制作，诠释剧中角色面对婚后感情考验的复杂情感。这是两位演员继前作后的第三次合作，也是首次与导演Jaew Yuthana携手。剧集改编自作家reallyb人气小说，讲述一对妻妻伴侣在婚后生活中面对家庭阻力的故事，将于每周五晚8时30分播出，并在3Plus Premium及Netflix同步上线。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰国媒体报道 近日，泰国人气CP档LingLing Kwong与Orm Kornnaphat为即将播出的GL剧《绘梦婚礼》献唱主题曲《ทั้งเจ็บทั้งรัก》（Hurt and Love），歌曲及MV已于6月17日正式上线。 《ทั้งเจ็บทั้งรัก》由知名制作团队NP TEAM操刀制作，通过歌曲传递剧中角色复杂而深刻的情感变化。歌词讲述一段曾经美好的感情逐渐发生改变，但因仍深爱对方而选择继续坚守，期待有朝一日能够重回从前的故事。 歌曲同时也是剧中两位主角的内心写照。作为一对新婚伴侣，两人在婚后生活中遭遇感情考验，不得不共同面对来自家庭与现实的重重压力。 电视剧《绘梦婚礼》讲述了一对因爱结合的妻妻伴侣，在婚后生活中面对女方母亲的反对与阻挠。对方千方百计试图拆散两人，使这段感情陷入考验，也让两位主角在“爱与痛”之间不断挣扎。 值得一提的是，该剧是LingLing与Orm继此前作品后的第三次合作，也是两人首次与知名导演Jaew Yuthana携手合作。剧集改编自作家reallyb的同名人气小说。 据悉，《绘梦婚礼》将于泰国时间每周五晚8时30分在三台播出，并同步上线3Plus Premium及Netflix平台。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：thestandard） The post LingOrm合体献唱新剧主题曲 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Koh Samui tourism leaders back ‘mafia crackdown’
desc: Koh Samui tourism leaders back ‘mafia crackdown’ Legacy Tourism industry representatives from Koh Samui and Koh Phangan have voiced their support behind a government crackdown on “ mafia-linked influence networks” in Thailand, warning that extortion, price gouging, and illegal land occupation are damaging the islands’ reputations and undermining fair competition. Ratchaporn Poolsawat, vice president of the Tourism Council of Thailand and former president of the Koh Samui Tourism Promotion Association, noted that the term “mafia” in a tourism context extends beyond traditional organised crime . Speaking yesterday, June 17, he said it encompasses any structure operating outside the law, including businesses that exploit tourists, monopolise public spaces for private gain, or use illegal nominees to conceal foreign ownership . The private sector is calling on the government to adopt a zero-tolerance approach, with equal and consistent enforcement of the law across all operators. title_cn: 苏梅岛旅游领袖支持政府「打黑」行动
summary_cn: 苏梅岛（Koh Samui）和普吉岛（Koh Phangan）旅游业代表支持政府打击黑帮相关影响力网络。泰国旅游委员会副主席指出，旅游领域的「黑帮」不仅指传统有组织犯罪，还涵盖任何在法律外运营的结构，包括讹诈游客、垄断公共场所、利用非法代理隐瞒外资所有权等。这些行为损害岛屿声誉、破坏公平竞争。业界呼吁政府采取零容忍政策、平等执法，并建议将非正式企业纳入正式税系。

title: Man saved from alleged manipulation, abuse by fortune teller influencer
desc: Man saved from alleged manipulation, abuse by fortune teller influencer Legacy A Thai man performed a hand signal for help on a TikTok video, alleging that a female fortune teller tricked him into sex , manipulated him, and physically assaulted him for several months. The man, identified only as Don, shared his experience on Facebook to warn others about the risks of placing excessive trust in supernatural claims. He described the incident as the most difficult experience of his life at the age of 40. According to Don, he first met Nicha, a fortune teller, through TikTok . During their conversations, she allegedly told him they had been soulmates in previous lives and claimed they had shared six lifetimes together. She also allegedly said that entering a relationship with him would lead to her future fame and success. Don said he struggled to understand how he became involved with the woman, but claimed she gradually gained influence over his life. Nicha required him to remain with her throughout the day and night while caring for her, claiming to suffer from several illnesses. title_cn: 男子自曝被占卜师网红操纵虐待数月
summary_cn: 泰国男子 Don 在社交媒体披露，自己被一位名叫 Nicha 的占卜师网红操纵和虐待长达数月。Nicha 通过 TikTok 结识他，声称两人系前世灵魂伴侣、共同经历六世轮回，诱导他日夜陪伴照顾自己。Don 称这是人生中最艰难的经历，因此在 Facebook 分享遭遇以警告他人，提醒公众防范因过度信任超自然宣称而遭骗局。

title: 泰国拟放宽医疗签证引资，拉动GDP长期增长
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月18日，泰国的医疗健康产业正迎来历史性的转折点。过去，泰国的医疗产业主要依赖于“医疗旅游”带来的红利，并凭借出色的性价比，在全球赢得了“高品质、高可及性医疗目的地”的口碑。然而，在国际大环境瞬息万变的当下，泰国必须将医疗卫生领域升级为高价值的“全新经济引擎”，全力向全球顶尖的医疗科技与生物中心迈进。 这一战略的核心目标是减少对高价值进口药品及医疗器械的依赖，并建立起“交叉补贴”的良性机制：从国际高端医疗市场中筹集资金，长线反哺并升级泰国本土的公共医疗卫生系统。例如，将“医疗签证”的在泰停留期限延长至1年以上，以吸引高净值客群和愿意承担比普通病患高出30%至50%费用的重症及复杂疾病患者，让他们能在泰国安心进行长期治疗与休养。 除此之外，该战略还有望拉动多项国际投资，包括全球规模高达9.8万亿美元的康养与高端养老经济、计划在泰建立细胞与基因疗法（ATMPs）及精准医疗等尖端药物研发基地的国际创新药企，以及进驻泰国无缝对接国际保险理赔系统与泰国各大医院的跨国医疗保险平台。 为了使泰国成为全球资本集团的首选，投资促进委员会（BOI）已正式推出新一轮（2026-2030年）的投资促进措施，以激励医疗及生物技术产业。如被归为A1类的深科技生物技术研究、医疗人工智能（AI）、靶向药物研发和临床研究中心等项目，将可享受长达8年的企业所得税（CIT）不设上限免税，此后5年还可享受50%的减税优惠。 与此同时，新投资促进措施还放宽了《外商经营法》的诸多限制，包括允许获得投资促进支持的外资在相关业务中持有100%的股份，并赋予外资购买和持有业务所需土地的所有权。另外，泰国还将设立“先进医疗促进与发展机构”，全力推动本土细胞与基因疗法（ATMPs）药物的生产，预计帮助泰国减少10%至20%的高价药物进口，为国家医疗系统节省近100亿至150亿泰铢的财政预算。若上述多项重磅措施顺利落地，将有巨额资金源源不断地涌入泰国的医疗健康生态圈，成为未来十年拉动泰国GDP增长的全新经济马达。 （编译：KA；来源：bangkokbiznews） The post 泰国拟放宽医疗签证引资，拉动GDP长期增长 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国放宽医疗签证吸引投资，推动医疗产业成为增长引擎
summary_cn: 泰国拟升级医疗产业为高价值经济部门。政府计划将医疗签证停留期延长至 1 年以上，吸引高净值患者支付 30-50% 溢价。投资促进委员会（BOI）推出 2026-2030 激励措施，对生物技术等尖端产业享受 8 年企业所得税（CIT）免税。放宽《外商经营法》限制，允许外资持 100% 股份购地。设立「先进医疗促进与发展机构」推动本地细胞与基因疗法（ATMPs）产业，预计减少 10-20% 高价药物进口，节省百亿泰铢预算。

title: 泰总理回收EEC监管权，亲自带队推销吸金
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月18日，泰国内阁在16日的会议中通过了两项决议，包括调整副总理兼交通部部长皮帕在东部经济走廊政策委员会办公室（EECO）的监管权限，以及取消皮帕东部经济走廊政策委员会主席（董事会主席）的职务。政府消息人士透露，总理兼内政部部长阿努廷上周与皮帕会面时提出，希望将EEC项目全部收回由他直接监管，并将其自身定位为泰国项目的首席推销员，把EEC作为向外国投资者推销的试点项目。 据悉，阿努廷的目标是让EEC成为全球粮食安全中心和数据中心投资枢纽，这需要多个部门之间相互协调合作，所以他认为有必要亲自监管EEC的工作。EEC地区在畜牧、水产、农业、水果、园艺等方面都有很好的基础，对全球不少国家来说意义重大，是EEC吸引巨额投资的优势。不过，政府也评估过，吸引EEC投资不能再只靠传统重工业，因为电力供应和水资源成本高且有局限。目前政府已针对第九类电力用户制定新电价，价格会比其他类别高，后续将重点发展高耗电的数据中心产业。 该消息人士表示，阿努廷和皮帕的谈话气氛并不紧张，阿努廷想把EEC的工作权限收回，而皮帕也主动提出让阿努廷直接监管更合适，因为过去EECO和BOI之间不时有摩擦，阿努廷亲自坐镇有利于两个单位朝着同一个方向工作。同时，该消息人士还否认了之前外界的猜测，他称，阿努廷收回EEC监管权力与修改私营部门“三大机场连接高铁”项目的合约无关。 此前，皮帕曾拒绝回答该问题，虽然他也否认泰自豪党内部出现裂痕。他说，任何工作大家都能一起做，他也能承担任何职务，没有矛盾。泰自豪党规模变大了，但这并不意味着会出现问题，而且党大了就要多照顾整体，是正常现象，也是一件好事，因为大家可以互相帮忙，一起做好工作。 （编译：KA；来源：thansettakij） The post 泰总理回收EEC监管权，亲自带队推销吸金 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰总理接管 EEC，亲自主推东部经济走廊投资
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin）收回东部经济走廊（EEC）政策委员会监管权，副总理皮帕（Pipa）被取消主席职务。阿努廷将自己定位为泰国 EEC 首席推销员，欲吸引国际投资。EEC 地区在畜牧、水产、农业等领域具优势。政府重点考虑发展高耗电的数据中心产业。两人讨论气氛友好，皮帕主动支持权限调整，以解决过去 EECO 与投资促进委员会（BOI）之间的协调问题。
